# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:alpine

RUN apk update && apk add --no-cache build-base \
  && apk add --no-cache python3 \
  && npm install -g nodemon \
  && npm install -g yarn \
  && yarn global add webpack@4.17.2 \
  && yarn global add webpack-cli@3.1.0 \
  && yarn global add babel-core@6.26.3 \
  && yarn global add babel-preset-env@1.6.1 \
  && yarn global add babel-preset-stage-2@6.24.1 \
  && yarn global add babel-plugin-transform-runtime@6.23.0 \
  && yarn global add babel-eslint@8.0.0 \
  && yarn global add eslint@4.19.1 \
  && npm install -g eslint-config-airbnb-base@11.1.6 \
  && npm install -g eslint-plugin-import@2.13.0 \
  && npm install -g eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y@5.1.0 \
  && npm install -g eslint-plugin-react@7.11.0 \
  && yarn add react@16.8.0 \
  && yarn add react-dom@16.8.0 \
  && yarn add react-router-dom@4.3.1 \
  && yarn add redux@3.7.2 \
  && yarn add react-redux@5.0.6 \
  && yarn add redux-thunk@2.2.0 \
  && yarn add axios@0.18.0 \
  && yarn add react-router-dom@4.3.1 \
  && yarn add prop-types@15.6.2
